title: Kana Kaangiren Lyrics Ananda Thandavam
stanzas:
Kana kangiren
kana kangiren kannaalanae
orey pandhalil orey medaiyil
iruvarumae. (2)

mannai thottaadum
selai selai kondu.
marbai thottaadum
thaali thaali kondu.
maniyai thottaadum
maalai maalai kondu
magizhven.

thinam thinamum
vaasam kondaadum
pookkal pookkal vaithu.
vaasal kollathaa
kolam kolamittu.
kadhal kondaadum
kanavan thirumadiyil
valarvaen.

Kana kangiren
kana kangiren kannaalanae
orey pandhalil orey medaiyil
iruvarumae (2)

en tholigalum
un tholargalum ayyo
nammai gaeli seiyya.
en selaiyim un vaettiyum
naanum.

nee killivida
naan thulli ezha
aahaa adhu inbam thunbam
naan killivida
en kaiviralgal yaengum.

thanjavur melam kotta
TamilNadu vazhthu solla
sivakaasi  vaettu saththam
oorai kilikkum

thennaattu .. vaasam
chettinaattil samayal vaasam
newyork-kai thaandi kooda
mookkai thulaikkum.

Kana kangiren
kana kangiren kannaalanae
orey pandhalil orey medaiyil
iruvarumae (2)

nam palliarai
nam chella arai anbae
adhil pookkal undu
poo aadai indri
veraadaigal illai.

aan enbathum
pen enbathum ayyo
ini artham aagum
nee enbathum
naan enbathum illai.

maarbodu pinnikondu
manimuththam ennikondu
madiyodu veedukatti
kadhal seiyuvaen.

udal konda aasai ellam
uyirkonda aasai endhan
uyir pogum munnaal
vazhvai vettri kolluven.

Kana kangiren
kana kangiren kannaalanae
orey pandhalil orey medaiyil
iruvarumae (2)

mannai thottaadum
selai selai kondu.
marbai thottaadum
thaali thaali kondu.
maniyai thottaadum
maalai maalai kondu
magizhven.

thinam thinamum
vaasam kondaadum
pookkal pookkal vaithu.
vaasal kollathaa
kolam kolamittu.
kadhal kondaadum
kanavan thirumadiyil
valarvaen.

seo.title: Kana Kaangiren Lyrics Ananda Thandavam
seo.description: Full Kana Kaangiren songs lyrics, Ananda Thandavam Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: GV PrakashKumar, Singer(s): Nithyashree.
seo.keywords: Ananda Thandavam, GV PrakashKumar, Nithyashree, Kana Kaangiren full lyrics, Ananda Thandavam songs lyrics, Kana Kaangiren lyrics snippets, Kana Kaangiren WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Kana Kaangiren lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kana Kaangiren?

The song is a romantic melody that celebrates love and togetherness.

Who composed the music for Ananda Thandavam?

The music for Ananda Thandavam was composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

Who is the singer of Kana Kaangiren?

The song is sung by the talented Nithyashree.

What is the release year of the movie Ananda Thandavam?

The movie Ananda Thandavam was released in 2009.

What emotions does Kana Kaangiren evoke?

The song evokes feelings of romance, happiness, and serenity.
enrichedMetadata.summary: Kana Kaangiren is a beautiful romantic melody from the movie Ananda Thandavam, capturing the essence of love and commitment. Sung by Nithyashree, the song portrays a couple's journey of togetherness and joy. GV Prakash Kumar's music enhances the soothing and happy mood of the song. It is perfect for weddings and anniversaries, evoking emotions of love and celebration. The lyrics paint a vivid picture of a blissful union, making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kana Kaangiren from the movie Ananda Thandavam. Nithyashree's soulful voice combined with GV Prakash Kumar's mesmerizing music creates a romantic ambiance. Dive into this classic love song that beautifully captures the essence of togetherness.
stanzaMeanings: I see a dream, I see a dream, in the same place, on the same stage, it's just the two of us.
With the cloth that touches the earth, with the sacred thread that touches the chest, with the garland that touches the bell, I will be happy.
Every day, with fragrant flowers, decorating the entrance with designs, I will grow in the lap of my loving husband.
I see a dream, I see a dream, in the same place, on the same stage, it's just the two of us.
My friends and your friends tease us. My saree and your dhoti, and me.
You release the parrot, I jump up with joy, that's happiness and sadness, I release my fingers.
The drums of Thanjavur beat, Tamil Nadu praises, the sound of Sivakasi fireworks echoes in the town.
The southern fragrance, the Chettinad cooking smell, even across New York, it pierces the nose.
I see a dream, I see a dream, in the same place, on the same stage, it's just the two of us.
Our bedroom, our dear room, my love, there are flowers, without flower clothes, there are no other things.
Being male and female, oh, now it makes sense, you and me, there is no difference.
With the chest, with the pearls, counting them, building a house with the moon, I will love.
All the desires of the body, all the desires of life, before my life ends, I will succeed in life.
I see a dream, I see a dream, in the same place, on the same stage, it's just the two of us.
With the cloth that touches the earth, with the sacred thread that touches the chest, with the garland that touches the bell, I will be happy.
Every day, with fragrant flowers, decorating the entrance with designs, I will grow in the lap of my loving husband.
